summary: Tested responsive device detection and adaptive layouts across mobile (390x844), tablet portrait (768x1024), tablet landscape (1024x768), and desktop (1920x1080). Found and fixed a critical bug in useDeviceDetect hook where mobile detection required iOS/Android user agent strings, causing desktop browsers with small viewports to not show mobile layout. After fix, all responsive features work correctly.
passed_tests: Mobile (390x844): Bottom navigation visible, sidebar hidden - PASS
Mobile (390x844): TableMap displays tables with proper scaling - PASS
Mobile (390x844): PaymentScreen shows 2-column payment methods grid - PASS
Mobile (390x844): Quick amounts in 3x2 grid layout - PASS
Tablet Portrait (768x1024): Sidebar navigation visible - PASS
Tablet Portrait (768x1024): PaymentScreen shows 2-column payment methods - PASS
Tablet Portrait (768x1024): Quick amounts in 3-column grid - PASS
Tablet Landscape (1024x768): Sidebar navigation visible - PASS
Desktop (1920x1080): TableMap shows full legend and larger tables - PASS
Desktop (1920x1080): PaymentScreen shows 3-column payment methods with vertical quick amounts - PASS
Device detection hook correctly identifies mobile/tablet/desktop based on screen width - PASS

bugs_fixed.issue: Mobile detection required iOS/Android user agent strings, causing desktop browsers with small viewports to not show mobile layout
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed isMobile detection from '(isIOS || isAndroid) && !isTablet && width < 768' to 'width < 768 && !isTablet' to properly detect mobile based on screen width alone

context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive device detection is now working correctly. The useDeviceDetect hook detects: mobile (width < 768px), tablet (768px <= width <= 1024px), desktop (width > 1024px). Layout component shows bottom navigation on mobile and sidebar on tablet/desktop. PaymentScreen and TableMap adapt their layouts based on device type.

useDeviceDetect_hook.screen_size_categories: WORKING - isXSmall, isSmall, isMedium, isLarge, isXLarge

payment_screen.mobile_layout: WORKING - 2-column payment methods, 3x2 quick amounts grid
payment_screen.desktop_layout: WORKING - 3-column payment methods, vertical quick amounts column

table_map.mobile_scaling: WORKING - Tables scale appropriately for small screens
table_map.tablet_scaling: WORKING - Tables scale for medium screens
table_map.desktop_scaling: WORKING - Tables scale for large screens with full legend
